title: [FIRRTL] Move enum attributes to dedicated td file
body:
When enum attributes are generated, there's no option to restrict generation to a particular dialect. When we generate enums from FIRRTL.td, if we include any enums from other dialects, then we will also generate the other dialects' enums, which in turn causes a compilation error early on. Basically, generating enums from FIRRTL.td prevents FIRRTL from using enum attributes from other dialects.

This PR moves enum attributes out to their own td file, so that when we generate our enums, we don't accidentally generate the enums of the dialects we depend on.
